prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为23749→24517→21905→21313→22003名，整体呈波动走势，2023–2024年位次前移（竞争加剧），2025年小幅后移至22003名，近3年均值约21740名，2025年基准约22003名；该校在广东省物理类招生计划持续扩增：2021年89人、2022年95人、2023年96人、2024年112人、2025年114人；2026年计划大幅增至133人，较2025年扩招约16.7%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年升至第57名（2025年第63名、2024年第68名），排名连续上升，学校综合实力和认可度稳步提升；抖音综合热度排名第7（高热），短视频曝光量在211高校中位居前列，反映报考关注度较高；2024年声誉评价为中性/混合（师德调查事件），未见明显负面舆情冲击；无投档断档记录；化学工程与技术获评A级，化学、材料科学与工程获评A-级，3个A-及以上学科，化工、材料、化学等主干学科实力突出，与该校招生专业高度关联，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科热门专业持续高热推荐，与该校工科试验班、自动化类、计算机类等招生方向匹配；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年44.0万人增加约3.6%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争，2025年物理类本科批436分、特殊类型招生控制线534分，近年波动平稳；该校位于北京市，属跨省招生；广东省并非其生源大本营，无本地倾斜；2025年该校在广东省总招生约114人，占全国计划比例约中等水平，地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次22003名、2026年大幅扩招约16.7%（缓解竞争）、软科排名持续上升（提升吸引力）、抖音高热关注（推高报考热度）以及广东省物理类考生增加约3.6%（加剧竞争）等多重因素，扩招的缓解效应大于考生增加和热度上升的加剧效应，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年有所后移（更容易进）。预测最低位次约24253名，区间23753–24753名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 23749 → 24517 → 21905 → 21313 → 22003, showing a fluctuating trend. Rankings moved forward in 2023–2024 (increased competition), slightly shifted back to 22003 in 2025, with a 3-year average of about 21740 and a 2025 baseline of about 22003. The university's enrollment plan in Guangdong for Physics Category has been continuously expanding: 89 in 2021, 95 in 2022, 96 in 2023, 112 in 2024, 114 in 2025; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 133, an expansion of about 16.7% compared to 2025, which notably alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking rose to 57th in 2026 (63rd in 2025, 68th in 2024), with continuously improving rankings and steadily enhancing comprehensive strength and recognition. It ranks 7th in Douyin comprehensive popularity (high heat), with short video exposure among the top in 211 universities, reflecting high application attention. The 2024 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (teacher ethics survey incident), with no significant negative public opinion impact; no record of enrollment gaps. Chemical Engineering and Technology is rated A, Chemistry and Materials Science and Engineering are rated A-, with 3 A- or above disciplines. Its strong core disciplines in chemical engineering, materials, and chemistry are highly relevant to its enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, matching the university's Engineering Experimental Class, Automation Class, and Computer Science enrollment directions. In 2026, Guangdong has about 456,000 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. In 2025, the Physics Category undergraduate batch line was 436 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 534 points, with stable fluctuations in recent years. The university is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment; Guangdong is not its main source province, with no local preference. In 2025, the university enrolled about 114 students in Guangdong, accounting for a moderate proportion of its national plan, with no significant regional preference factor.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 22003, a significant 16.7% enrollment expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), continuously rising Soft Science rankings (enhancing attractiveness), high Douyin attention (boosting application heat), and a 3.6% increase in Guangdong Physics Category candidates (intensifying competition), the mitigating effect of the expansion outweighs the intensifying effects of candidate increase and heat rise. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will shift back (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 24253, with a range of 23753–24753.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Hongde Academy)
- Chemistry (Basic Top-Notch)
- Computer Class (including Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Automation Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics, Physics Electronics and Management)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Chemical Engineering, Big Data Dual Bachelor's Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Green Chemical Engineering and Biomedicine)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Energy and Biomedicine)
- Science Experimental Class (Green Chemistry)
- Business Administration Class (New Liberal Arts, Economics, Management, Law).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 23753–24753, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 23700), prioritize Tier 1 majors like Hongde Academy and Computer Class. If the ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 24700), mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 6636 → 6763 → 5950 → 6981 → 7555, showing a fluctuating and then declining trend. After a brief rise in 2023, rankings declined consecutively in 2024 and 2025, with a cumulative decline of about 1600 positions over the past two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 7555. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong has been stable in recent years: 11 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 12 in 2024, and 12 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 12, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it rose to 57th (from 63rd in 2025), with rankings continuously improving and overall strength steadily increasing. It ranks 7th in comprehensive Douyin popularity (high heat), with short video exposure among the top of 211 universities, reflecting high application attention. The 2024 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious negative public opinion impact. Its strong disciplines include Chemical Engineering and Technology (A), Chemistry (A-), and Materials Science and Engineering (A-), all science and engineering fields, with no direct mapping to History Category majors (Law, English, Business Administration). The advantage disciplines have limited appeal to liberal arts applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major has high social popularity (recommended), Business Administration is divided and requires observation, and English major has average popularity. In 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong is about 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. In 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch line was 464 points, and the special type enrollment control line was 557 points, with stable fluctuations in recent years. The university is located in Beijing, a cross-province enrollment. Guangdong is not its main source of students, with no local preference. The History Category enrollment is small (only 12), so regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 7555, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, rising Soft Science ranking (enhancing appeal), high Douyin attention (increasing application heat), and a significant increase of about 11.6% in Guangdong History Category examinees (intensifying competition), the dominant effect is the intensified competition from the expanded candidate pool. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move forward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 7475, with a range of 6975–7975.
